description: Style NoteSharing the simple look and feel of the archival plimsoll shoe, the Advent shoe from adidas blends the retro and modern to create comfortable and stylish footwear perfect for sport.Product DetailsBlack and blue shoe with central lace-ups and overlaysMeshed and padded tongue and innerMoulded midsole detailing for styleVulcanised rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
